meta.title: Mystery Garden House — Boutique Garden Guest House
meta.description: A secret garden guesthouse in the heart of Famagusta's Walled City, in the shadow of ancient walls and 365 historic monuments. A peaceful escape intertwined with nature, at the heart of history.

hero.title: Mystery Garden House
hero.subtitle: Discover the Secret of the Garden

story.label: Our Story
story.heading: A Garden Hidden Within the Walls
story.p1: Mystery Garden House is a lush sanctuary tucked among centuries-old stones, right at the heart of Famagusta's Walled City, encircled by three kilometres of Venetian walls. The moment you step through our gate, the murmur of the ancient city gives way to birdsong, rustling leaves and the serene quiet of our garden.
story.p2: Among 365 historic monuments bearing the traces of the Lusignan, Venetian, Genoese and Ottoman eras, we bring living history and the peace of nature together in one courtyard. As Birsen and Mustafa Tamer, we opened this garden and our traditional Cyprus home — nurtured with care over many years — to share its secret with you.

rooms.label: Our Rooms
rooms.heading: Each One a Story
rooms.subheading: Thoughtfully designed stays in the embrace of nature.
rooms.bathroomNote: You are staying in an authentic Cyprus house: true to our traditional architecture, the bathroom and WC are located just outside the rooms, only a few steps away — a genuine part of the charm of a centuries-old home.

wifi.title: Superb Fast WiFi
wifi.desc: High-speed internet our guests rave about, throughout the property

breakfast.title: Garden Breakfast
breakfast.desc: Enjoy a continental breakfast served in our peaceful garden

garden.title: Quiet Garden
garden.desc: A serene retreat with friendly pets and cosy seating corners

parking.title: Free Parking
parking.desc: Free private parking right on the street beside you

house.title: Authentic Cyprus House
house.desc: True to traditional architecture, bathrooms and toilets are just outside the rooms, a few steps away

pet.title: Friendly Companions
pet.desc: Our garden's lovable friends await you with a warm welcome

items.name: Elif & Can
items.text: The most peaceful place we have ever stayed. The breakfast in the garden was something else. We will definitely come back.

items.name: Sarah M.
items.text: A true hidden paradise. The scent of lavender, the warm welcome and the perfect details... Words fall short.

items.name: Mehmet Y.
items.text: Waking up in a garden steeped in history, right beside the ancient walls, was unforgettable. Everything is a five-minute walk away — and the hosts' warmth is something else entirely.

ctaSection.heading: Ready to Live the Garden's Secret?
ctaSection.subheading: Book today and discover the magic of dusk.

footer.tagline: A lush escape hidden in the shadow of ancient walls, in Famagusta's Walled City.
footer.newsletterDesc: For special offers and news from the garden.
footer.subscribed: Thank you! Your subscription is received.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: The story of a garden, ancient walls and a warm home.
about.philosophyHeading: At the Heart of History, Embraced by Nature
about.philosophyP1: Mystery Garden House is a traditional Cyprus home made of very old, antique structures. We preserve this house — every stone whispering centuries of stories — exactly as it is, in all its authenticity. Here, luxury lies not in show, but in the warmth of living history, in simple beauty and in heartfelt hospitality.
about.philosophyP2: We are a couple devoted to nature, finding joy in life's smallest beauties. We opened our doors because we connect easily with people from all walks of life. Our aim is to offer you not merely a place to stay, but the genuine warmth of a home adorned with painting, ceramics, music and the scent of the garden.
about.hostRole: Your Hosts & Keepers of the Garden
about.hostBio: As Birsen and Mustafa, our days begin in the garden; tending the soil and a patient love for the sea and fishing are our greatest passions. We are warm-hearted, empathetic nature-lovers. We also live surrounded by art: we play the accordion in choirs and create works in painting, ceramics and stained glass — to date we have taken part in 3 solo and many mixed exhibitions. We would be delighted to welcome you in Turkish, English and Greek, and to share our table and our stories.
about.locationHeading: At the Heart of History, Within Ancient Walls
about.locationDesc: We sit at the very heart of Famagusta's Walled City, embraced by three kilometres of Venetian walls. Just beyond our gate, within easy walking distance, 365 historic monuments bearing the traces of the Venetian, Lusignan, Genoese and Ottoman eras await. And for those who wish to explore this rare heritage at their own pace, our bicycle rental turns every cobbled street into a journey through time.
